The '''siege of Caprioril''' was conducted by the [[Imperial Coalition]]<ref name="Dark Source" /> in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> during the [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|offensive]] prior to [[Operation Shadow Hand]]. [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] was injured during the assault. The siege led the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] to release ''[[Why Do We Fight the Empire?]]''.<ref name="Dark Source" />
